allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const g={}; const code=fs.readFileSync\(''js/questions/csharp.js'',''utf8''\).replace\(/window\\./g,''g.''\); try { eval\(code\); console.log\(''OK, items:'', g.questions_csharp.length\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''ERR:'', e.message\); }")
